map.pantry_cooking_flow: User (UI) -> main.py (/api/cooking/suggest) -> FreeAIClient (gs_food_culinary_guide persona) -> FREE AI (/v1/infer) -> (Skill exec back to) main.py (/api/internal/pantry/inventory) -> returns stock -> FREE AI computes recipe -> returns to Python -> User (UI)
map.general_chat: User (UI) -> main.py (/api/chat) -> FreeAIClient (gs_food_general_assistant) -> FREE AI -> results.
